subject: refactor(extract): move pure utility functions to dedicated modules
body:
Extract pure functions from 3 oversized components into utils/ modules
to reduce file sizes and improve testability.

1. utils/exportHelpers.js (127 lines): getTimestamp, waitForPaint,
   hideCanvas, setFullScale, captureAsBlob, captureForPdf,
   downloadDiagnosticImage, FORMAT_OPTIONS, FILE_EXTENSIONS, MIME_TYPES.
   ExportButtons.jsx: 701 → 579 lines.

2. utils/canvasRenderers.js (73 lines): buildFilterStyle, getAlignItems,
   getJustifyContent, getFrameDimensions, isDuotoneOverlay. Only 5 of
   30+ functions extracted — the rest close over component state
   (themeColors, fonts, images etc.) and would need 5-10 params each.
   AdCanvas.jsx: 878 → 840 lines.

3. utils/layoutHelpers.js (51 lines): cellToSection, getFirstCellOfSection,
   getMaxSize, MIN_SIZE, MAX_SIZE constants.
   LayoutTab.jsx: 952 → 912 lines.

Tags: refactor, extract, export, canvas, layout, utils
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: extract-large-components
Semver: patch
